strengths: Lead delivers the core prediction quickly and clearly.
Subheads are relevant and break up the text effectively.
Key Takeaways are concise and informative.
The article accurately reflects the provided reference facts.
New rule changes are explained clearly and their potential impact is noted.
The FAQ section provides genuinely useful, distinct information.
Sources are credible and appropriately linked.
weaknesses: The human voice could be slightly more distinctive; some phrasing is a bit standard for news reporting.
While readable, the sentence rhythm could be varied slightly more to enhance engagement.

The SEO score is moderate due to the primary keyword appearing only once in the title and not naturally within the body text, which is acceptable for a news piece but could be slightly improved for discoverability.
